name: tendergraph
description: Evidence-backed tender analysis with GPT-5.6 and a code-owned audit harness

interface.longDescription: Runs procurement analysis through GPT-5.6 in Codex, then enforces claim admission, evidence grounding, scope isolation, and deterministic fallback in application code.
defaultPrompt: Audit the Chile golden tender and publish its trace.
Explain who won Lot 1 and why, with evidence.
Run the TenderGraph portability proof for the EU case.
